message:
fix(gen_server,mpsc): cast-scoped DropOldest eviction and Reply drop safety

Two interrelated fixes to the GenServer mailbox:

1. Cast-scoped eviction: DropOldest backpressure now only evicts queued
   Cast envelopes, never Calls. Previously a full mailbox could evict a
   pending Call, requiring the eviction handler to manually abort the
   reply obligation. The new send_evict_oldest_where() on mpsc::Sender
   accepts a predicate, and GenServerHandle/Ref pass
   |queued| matches!(queued, Envelope::Cast { .. }). When no cast is
   evictable (e.g., mailbox full of Calls), try_cast returns Full.

2. Reply<R> drop safety: the inner permit is now Option-wrapped. send()
   and abort() take() it, and a custom Drop impl handles the case where
   a Reply is dropped during panic unwind — it aborts the permit instead
   of detonating the drop-bomb, preventing double-panic aborts.

Tests updated: the old test that verified Call eviction + abort is
replaced with a test confirming Calls are preserved and Full is returned.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
